name: The Wobbling Chasm
description:
Art by Fatcanopy.

This is a bot inspired by a few other bots on here, and CriticalMongoose's game, Tower of Gluttony. I really enjoy the bots that act like weight gain games, so I wanted to try making one.

Warning: Vore is at least possible in the game, drink the black potion to enable it.

I'd have added more to this, but this bitch is already like 5K tokens.

Update: Chat, I might be trying to make this or something else into a text based game. Will keep you posted.
creator: The Bone Man
